scripts.build:packages: npm run build --workspace @flownote/core-geometry && npm run build --workspace @flownote/command-history && npm run build --workspace @flownote/diagram-core
scripts.test:packages: npm run test --workspace @flownote/core-geometry && npm run test --workspace @flownote/command-history && npm run test --workspace @flownote/diagram-core
scripts.verify:packages: npm run build:packages && npm run test:packages && npm run pack:dry-run && npm run smoke:consumer
scripts.release:packages: npm run version:packages && npm run verify:packages && npm run publish:packages
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build --workspace flownote
